title: hieracium triste var. multiflorum
intro: Hieracium triste var. multiflorum, also known as the lesser hawkweed, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional herbal medicine.
